home.hero_headline: Custom paint booths for demanding professionals
home.hero_subline: From automotive body shops to industrial workshops — MatLoc Indus designs, installs and maintains your surface treatment equipment.
home.sectors_subtitle: Equipment designed for the specific constraints of each trade.
home.sector_auto_desc: Approved booths, VU/VL standards, premium finishes. Everything your workshop needs to paint to the highest standard.
home.sector_industry_desc: Wood, metal, plastic — booths sized for your parts, volumes and industrial processes.
home.solutions_subtitle: Complete equipment, from painting systems to energy-saving solutions.
home.why_subtitle: What sets us apart in the field.
home.why_custom_desc: Every installation is designed to your constraints: floor space, height, workload, local regulations.
home.why_accomp_desc: From feasibility study to commissioning and after-sales — one team, one responsibility.
home.why_expert_desc: Our technicians are trained and certified. Compliance checks, preventive maintenance, fast response.
home.why_energy_desc: Our hybrid and electric solutions reduce your consumption. Measurable ROI from year one.
home.realizations_subtitle: Installations completed for professionals across France.
home.process_step1_desc: We analyse your needs, space and regulatory requirements. Free, no commitment.
home.process_step2_desc: Sizing, drawings, equipment selection. You validate before anything starts.
home.process_step3_desc: Our technicians handle the assembly. Deadlines respected, clean workshop, careful commissioning.
home.process_step4_desc: Maintenance contracts, compliance checks, call-outs within 48h. We stay available.
home.cta_section_subline: Free technical study, no obligation. Reply within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Your partner in custom surface treatment equipment.
